questionHtml:
The hydrolysis of a pure sample of an organic molecule produces a pentose sugar, thymine, guanine and cytosine. What other substances could be expected to be present in the hydrolysed sample?

A. RNA

B. Uracil

C. Phosphate

D. ATP
